name: agentforge-codex
description: AgentForge host plugin for Codex CLI-driven agent teams and autonomous development cycles.

interface.shortDescription: Build and run AgentForge teams through Codex.
interface.longDescription: AgentForge Codex exposes AgentForge team forging, readiness checks, runtime invocation, and autonomous cycle workflows using the Codex CLI runtime.
defaultPrompt: Run an AgentForge Codex cycle preview.
Invoke an AgentForge agent with Codex.
